# Codex Email Skill

Codex Email Skill is a skill package for Codex-ready email implementation workflows for codebases and content systems.

Install:

```bash
npx skills add codexemailskill
```

## Primary agent resources

- Markdown index: https://codexemailskill.com/index.md
- Skill page: https://codexemailskill.com/skill/index.md
- Raw SKILL.md: https://codexemailskill.com/skills/codexemailskill/SKILL.md
- Skill discovery JSON: https://codexemailskill.com/.well-known/skills/index.json

## Articles

- How to Build an Agent-Ready Codex Email Strategy: https://codexemailskill.com/articles/agent-ready-email-strategy/index.md
- The Practical Codex Email Operations Playbook for AI Agents: https://codexemailskill.com/articles/email-operations-playbook/index.md
- Codex Email Skill Audit Checklist: From Prompt to Production: https://codexemailskill.com/articles/email-skill-audit-checklist/index.md
